## FillingSlotManager() function

Filling slot manager component with full CRUD support.

Provides management of filling slots including: - Add/remove/rename slots - Select fillings within each slot - Add/remove filling options within each slot

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function FillingSlotManager({ slots, actions, hasChanges, getFillingName, onAddFillingOption, onAddSlot, showRemoveSlot, showRemoveOption, allowRename, label, disabled }: IFillingSlotManagerProps): React.ReactElement | null;
```

**Returns:**

React.ReactElement \| null

Filling slot manager element

## Example


```tsx
const { slots, actions, hasChanges } = useFillingSlotManagement({...});

<FillingSlotManager
  slots={slots}
  actions={actions}
  hasChanges={hasChanges}
  getFillingName={(opt) => {
    if (opt.type === 'recipe') {
      return runtime.getFilling(opt.id)?.name ?? opt.id;
    }
    return runtime.getIngredient(opt.id)?.name ?? opt.id;
  }}
  onAddFillingOption={(slotId) => {
    setPickerSlotId(slotId);
    setShowFillingPicker(true);
  }}
/>
```
